mapper.insert: insert into deep_research_task_hits ( run_id, task_id, hit_ordinal, channel, evidence_type, source_id, article_key, concept_id, title, chunk_id, path, original_score, rrf_score, fused_score, content_excerpt ) values ( #{record.runId}, #{record.taskId}, #{record.hitOrdinal}, #{record.channel}, #{record.evidenceType}, #{record.sourceId}, #{record.articleKey}, #{record.conceptId}, #{record.title}, #{record.chunkId}, #{record.path}, #{record.originalScore}, #{record.rrfScore}, #{record.fusedScore}, #{record.contentExcerpt} )
